creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Given that CDDB (v1) is legacy and has been broken multiple times (services disappearing, odd changes to services etc) it's better to retire it completely. Multiple (major) distros have already dropped support in libraries such as libcdio (including us) etc and it makes sense as there are better services/protocols available such as Musicbrainz.

See also
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gracenote
https://wiki.musicbrainz.org/FreeDB

Having a quick look libcddb is optional (if found) however the meson build doesn't provide a way to disable support if found out of the box.

I've been slowly working on removing it and planned removal is within a month or so.

Best regards,
Daniel
